Postdoctoral Researcher Announcement for the TÜBİTAK1001 Project titled “The Role of Music Videos in Destination Marketing”

Required features:

Being prone to data science, equipped with social media analytics, information processing and knowledge of statistics/mathematics.

Have experience in academic writing in English.

During the project, he/she will take part in coordinating the project team, collecting data, reporting the results and turning them into academic studies.

The duration is 24 months and candidates living in Istanbul are preferred.

For application and information, Prof. Dr. Metin Kozak (

[email protected]

)
